content.en:
When Ye Tian hooked up with the Ruins Stone Tower and showed his superior immeasurable body secret technique, the Ruins Stone Tower recognized it and quickly gave Ye Tian benefits.

Airplanes!!!!

Ten Black God Armor Stones fell on Ye Tian's hand, attracting the attention of other high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and even the Black Sea Great Ancestor was jealous!

"How could he be rewarded with ten Black God Armor Stones!"

Xinghai Ancestor didn't understand.

Ye Tian was just a second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and he had fallen behind many times before, why did he suddenly pass quickly this time, and he also obtained the reward of ten Black God Armor Stones!

Does this have anything to do with the ruins of the stone tower?

The Star Sea Ancestor and other high-level immeasurable lifeforms also wanted to buy a Black God Armor Stone from Ye Tian, but Ye Tian had already been sent to the sixth layer of the Relic Stone Tower by a ray of light from the Relic Stone Tower.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that he was definitely being targeted.

When he left the ruins stone tower, he was afraid that he would be besieged.

However, the combat power of his replica body was already comparable to that of a powerful third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and if he wore the defensive armor formed by the Black God Armor, his life-saving ability would still be strong.

Even if the Star Sea Great Ancestor wanted to kill him, it would take some effort.

Airplanes!

A ray of light enveloped Ye Tian.

The next moment, Ye Tian entered the sixth layer of the Ruined Stone Tower.

......

The sixth floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

When Ye Tian came here, the eyes of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor came.

"It's you, I thought it was the Star Sea Ancestor who came!" said the Blood Ancestor in surprise.

Ye Tian did not speak, but accepted the message of the sixth layer.

But at this moment, the Blood Ancestor was staring at Ye Tian carefully, as if he wanted to confirm something.

"It shouldn't be him!"

The Blood Ancestor said secretly.

Because the breath of will is different, when he saw the Xuanming Great Ancestor, he had a sense of familiarity, and after careful investigation, he found that the immeasurable body on the Xuanming Great Ancestor belonged to the same immeasurable body as Ye Tian, and the breath was close, indicating that the immeasurable path of cultivation was almost the same.

But the will breath is different, which means that the Xuanming Great Ancestor is not Ye Tian's clone.

However, the Xuanming Great Ancestor was Ye Tian's copy body, which was beyond the comprehension of the Bloody Great Ancestor, so he still didn't recognize it.

"The sixth layer is actually a direct benefit!"

After Ye Tian received the message, he was surprised.

Because the sixth layer is used to enhance the immeasurable will, a stone level in front of you is the treasure that enhances the immeasurable will, and you can withstand the baptism of an inexplicable force when you walk on it, so as to greatly refine the immeasurable will.

Of course, if you come to the end, you can still get the benefits.

"A total of nine hundred and ninety-nine stone steps!"

Ye Tian glanced at it and muttered.

At this moment, the Blood Ancestor was sitting cross-legged at the place of more than three hundred stone steps, and did not continue to advance.

Obviously, his limit should be there!

According to the requirements of the Ruins Stone Tower, if you want to enter the seventh layer, you only need to enter the six hundred stone steps.

Of course, even if you can't enter, it doesn't matter, you can always practice on the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

In other words, from today onwards, Ye Tian could come all the way to the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Pagoda and treat this place as a cultivation treasure land.

"Even if you can't enter the seventh layer, this treatment alone is very good!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he stepped onto the first stone staircase.

Rumble!!!!

A total of inexplicable power acted on Ye Tian's immeasurable will, and this power made Ye Tian's immeasurable will seem to enter a stone grinding disc and constantly crush and temper.

In fact, when it came to a high-level immeasurable lifeform, it would be more difficult for the immeasurable will to continue to improve, and Ye Tian's immeasurable will was not much worse than a third-stage top-notch existence like the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

I saw Ye Tian step by step on the higher stone steps, he didn't stop, after all, the higher the number of stone steps, the better the quenching effect.

Ten stone steps!

Twenty stone steps!

One hundred stone steps!

When Ye Tian reached the three hundred and one stone steps, he finally reached the limit, and there was no way to continue walking, otherwise the immeasurable will would not be able to bear it, and he would still be forcibly squeezed down.

"Let's practice here!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to take the initiative to cater to this force to temper his immeasurable will, this kind of cultivation was more powerful than the effect of swallowing most of the resources.

And when the replica body of the Xuanming Dao Ancestor was cultivating on the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower, Ye Tian had no restrictions, he was trying to create the Mahayana Immeasurable Body.

If he creates the Mahayana immeasurable body, and then cultivates the Mahayana immeasurable body, his strength will also usher in a metamorphosis.

And so, in the years that followed.

Ye Tian began to create an immeasurable body with all his strength, abandoning other cultivations.

Time flies, time passes quickly.

On the sixth floor of the ruins stone tower, there were gradually other great ancestors, such as the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea.

"Your name is Xuanming Great Ancestor, I want to trade a few Black God Armor Stones from you!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said in a commanding tone.

"Not interested in trading!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

This kind of refusal annoyed the Xinghai Great Ancestor, "Do you know who I am? I am the sixth place on the Xuanqi Realm's immeasurable blood list, Xinghai Great Ancestor, with my strength, I can kill you countless times with a wave of my hand!"

However, Ye Tian ignored the Xinghai Ancestor and continued to cultivate.

Seeing this, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea decided to directly wipe out Ye Tian after Ye Tian left the Ruins Stone Tower, and directly snatched his ten Black God Armor Stones.

As for reputation, he didn't care.

After all, ten Black God Armor Stones were enough for him not to care about his reputation, this was a treasure that greatly improved his combat power, even a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage would care, and he naturally cared even more.

Another period of time had passed, and the number of people on the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower had slightly increased, and Ye Tian's immeasurable will was really not an advantage in this group of third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it could even be said to be the bottom ranks.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this anymore, anyway, he could always practice here, and there was no need to go out.

......

Before you know it, the first year of the 50 million realms has passed.

This is also a relatively long time for the average Great Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created his Mahayana Immeasurable Body, and it was the Mahayana Immeasurable Body that he created that was most suitable for him according to himself, which was far more powerful than the Infinity Body, and the potential was not comparable to the Infinity Body.

And he also named this Mahayana immeasurable body Taihao immeasurable body, because the actual reputation of that immeasurable diagram is called Taihao diagram.

And after Taihao's immeasurable body is cultivated, the effect is that the defense is terrifying, and it contains terrifying qi and blood, and the flesh and blood will be strengthened to an unimaginable extent.
